---
id: regenerate-webhook-secret
title: "Regenerate Webhook Secret"
description: "Rotate the org's signature webhook HMAC secret. The new secret is returned **once** — store it immediately. Old HMAC signatures will fail as soon as this call succeeds."
sidebar_label: "Regenerate Webhook Secret"
hide_title: true

  # Regenerate Webhook Secret
  
  Regenerate Webhook Secret
  
  <DisplayEndpoint method="POST" endpoint="/api/webhooks/signature/regenerate"/>
  <QueryTable title="query" data="W10=" />
  <HeadersTable title="headers" data="" />
  <BodyTable title="body" data="undefined" />
